https://groqstatus.com/ Groq Status: Real-Time Visibility Into GroqCloud's System Health and status 2026-07-21T13:03:24.434Z incident.io Groq Status: Real-Time Visibility Into GroqCloud's System Health and status page updates https://storage.googleapis.com/incident-io-status-page-logos/f7001194-60c9-42e6-9d3d-47167677239f <![CDATA[Data Center Failure Impacting Capacity]]> https://groqstatus.com//incidents/01KWFYMRXK20CA49GZJNWC9W2B 2026-07-02T00:35:17.000Z Status: Resolved

The capacity issue has been resolved. All services are operating at normal capacity. The incident was caused by a power loss issue that led to a cooling system failure at one of our US Central data centers. We apologize for any disruption and appreciate your patience.

Affected components
  • llama-3.3-70b-versatile (Operational)
  • openai/gpt-oss-20b (Operational)
